opinion.h2: William A. WAREHIME, d. b. a Nezen Milk Food Company, et al., petitioners, v. H. H. VARNEY, Milk Market Agent, War Food Administration, et al. No. 1296.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Paul W. Walter, for petitioners.
Assistant Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Tom C. Clark, Mr. Robert S. Erdahl and Miss Beatrice Rosenberg, for respondents.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Circuit Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit.
